mapper.select: SELECT CAST(u.id AS CHAR) AS id, u.username AS username, COALESCE(u.nick_name, u.username) AS display_name, CAST(r.id AS CHAR) AS role_id, COALESCE(r.role_code, '') AS role_code, COALESCE(r.role_name, 'Unassigned') AS role, u.status AS status, COALESCE(u.phone, '-') AS phone, COALESCE(u.email, '-') AS email, DATE_FORMAT(u.created_time, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s') AS created_at FROM sys_user u LEFT JOIN sys_user_role ur ON ur.user_id = u.id LEFT JOIN sys_role r ON r.id = ur.role_id AND r.deleted = 0 WHERE u.deleted = 0 ORDER BY u.id DESC LIMIT #{limit} OFFSET #{offset}

SELECT CAST(u.id AS CHAR) AS id, u.username AS username, COALESCE(u.nick_name, u.username) AS display_name, CAST(r.id AS CHAR) AS role_id, COALESCE(r.role_code, '') AS role_code, COALESCE(r.role_name, 'Unassigned') AS role, u.status AS status, COALESCE(u.phone, '-') AS phone, COALESCE(u.email, '-') AS email, DATE_FORMAT(u.created_time, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s') AS created_at FROM sys_user u LEFT JOIN sys_user_role ur ON ur.user_id = u.id LEFT JOIN sys_role r ON r.id = ur.role_id AND r.deleted = 0 WHERE u.deleted = 0 AND u.id = #{userId} LIMIT 1

SELECT u.id AS userId, u.username AS username, u.nick_name AS displayName, u.phone AS phone, u.email AS email, u.status AS status, u.user_type AS userType, u.member_id AS memberId, r.id AS roleId, r.role_code AS roleCode, r.role_name AS roleName FROM sys_user u LEFT JOIN sys_user_role ur ON ur.user_id = u.id LEFT JOIN sys_role r ON r.id = ur.role_id AND r.deleted = 0 WHERE u.deleted = 0 AND u.id = #{userId} LIMIT 1
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO sys_user ( username, password, nick_name, user_type, member_id, phone, email, status, created_by, updated_by, deleted ) VALUES ( #{username}, #{password}, #{nickName}, #{userType}, #{memberId}, #{phone}, #{email}, #{status}, #{createdBy}, #{updatedBy}, 0 )

INSERT INTO member_account ( member_code, member_type, member_name, phone, email, status, remark, created_by, updated_by, deleted ) VALUES ( #{memberCode}, #{memberType}, #{memberName}, #{phone}, #{email}, 'ENABLED', #{remark}, #{createdBy}, #{updatedBy}, 0 )

INSERT INTO customer_info ( member_id, company_name, member_level, contact_name, contact_phone, invite_code, status, remark, created_by, updated_by, deleted ) VALUES ( #{memberId}, COALESCE(#{companyName}, ''), 'NORMAL', #{contactName}, #{contactPhone}, #{inviteCode}, 'ENABLED', #{remark}, #{createdBy}, #{updatedBy}, 0 )

INSERT INTO merchant_info ( member_id, shop_name, license_no, contact_name, contact_phone, shop_desc, status, remark, created_by, updated_by, deleted ) VALUES ( #{memberId}, #{shopName}, NULL, #{contactName}, #{contactPhone}, #{remark}, 'ENABLED', #{remark}, #{createdBy}, #{updatedBy}, 0 )

INSERT INTO supplier_info ( member_id, supplier_name, qualification_file_id, contact_name, contact_phone, supply_desc, status, remark, created_by, updated_by, deleted ) VALUES ( #{memberId}, #{supplierName}, NULL, #{contactName}, #{contactPhone}, #{remark}, 'ENABLED', #{remark}, #{createdBy}, #{updatedBy}, 0 )
